title: Anthropic Mythos AI: The Model That Could Hack Anything — Now in Safe Mode | The Breakdown
description: Anthropic released Mythos — an AI that finds critical cybersecurity vulnerabilities in hours. Then they released Fable 5, a safe version for the public. Then they suspended both. The full story of the most capable — and most restricted — AI model ever built.
